chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-6206 / 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ D/O MATTER 1) For hearing of CMA No. 2073/2025. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 2074/2025. 22.10.2025. Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Sibghatullah Shaikh, Assistant Director, ACE (Respondent No. 2). ___________________ 1) There is no need for making an application to condone the delay as the restoration application had not been made with delay. CMA disposed of. 2) For reasons stated in the affidavit, the restoration application is allowed and the Petition restored. Hearing of the main Petition is taken up. The findings of the Complaint Redressal Committee (CRC) against the Petitioner was that technical documents submitted by it, did not include Completion Certificate of completed works in last 3 years as required in the NIT. Such finding was appealed by the Petitioner before the Review Committee under Rule 32 of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules, 2010. Per the Petitioner, the Review Committee did not decide the appeal. Learned Counsel for Petitioner is asked to demonstrate that the Petitioner had submitted Completion Certificates of completed work of last 3 years as required in the NIT; however, he is unable to do so. Admittedly, it has now been two years since the contract was awarded. In the circumstances, we are not inclined to interfere with the impugned proceedings. Petition is therefore, dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
